name: Mirvac Group
analysis: MGR has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 26% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.4× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$1.7700, stop A$1.6681, target A$2.0200 (2.45:1) — then trail it.
